title: New AI tool brings transparency to the solar buying process

title: Chinese startup unveils world’s 1st ‘brain-to-robot’ platform
description: Chinese tech unicorn BrainCo has introduced the world’s first integrated ‘brain-to-robot’ platform at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference. This platform allows users to control robots with their thoughts using an EEG headset. BrainCo claims its platform works with a variety of third-party hardware and could help solve the robotics industry’s data shortage.

title: Nikhil Kamath and Brian Armstrong: Dissecting the Future of Crypto and AI
description: In an insightful podcast episode, Nikhil Kamath engages Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong in a thought-provoking discussion about the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence. title: AI Will Make IT Services More Important, Not Replace Them: Anand Mahindra
description: Tech Mahindra Chairman Anand Mahindra said artificial intelligence will create major opportunities for the IT sector rather than diminish its role. Addressing concerns over AI replacing IT services, he said companies will become crucial in integrating, governing and applying AI solutions for businesses while India must emerge as a creator of AI capabilities
content:
Tech Mahindra Chairman Anand Mahindra has dismissed concerns that artificial intelligence could weaken India’s IT services industry, saying AI will instead create one of the biggest growth opportunities for the sector.

title: Guterres: AI must be shaped by 'all of humanity', not a handful of powers
description: UN Secretary-General António Guterres on Friday urged governments and technology companies to work together to ensure artificial intelligence (AI) benefits all countries.
